audience: Business owners, experts, and marketing or communications leads planning a sustainable business podcast or video podcast
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Bedrijven helpen beslissen waarom, voor wie en hoe ze een duurzame bedrijfspodcast opzetten, opnemen, publiceren en meten

searchIntent.question: How do you start, produce, publish and measure a sustainable business podcast?
searchIntent.geographicContext: English-speaking SMEs and organisations in Belgium, particularly Limburg, Belgium, Flanders and neighbouring regions

mainKeyword: how to start a business podcast
longTailKeywords: start a podcast for your business
directAnswer: To start a sustainable business podcast, define one business objective, a specific audience and a repeatable editorial promise before choosing equipment. Test the complete format with one publishable pilot, then organise recording, hosting, distribution, rights, accessible transcripts and measurement as one workflow.
title: How to start a business podcast: from format to publication
metaDescription: Learn how to start a business podcast with a clear goal, sustainable format, pilot, recording workflow, hosting, distribution, rights, transcripts and measurement.
h1: How to start a business podcast: from a strong format to measurable publication
factsToPreserve: A podcast does not automatically generate reach, trust, leads or revenue
There is no universally ideal episode length or publishing frequency
Podcast hosts, RSS feeds, listening apps and owned episode pages are distinct layers
Platform analytics use different definitions and should not be compared blindly
Consent to record does not automatically grant unlimited reuse rights
A transcript supports accessibility for prerecorded audio; video also requires accurate captions and may require additional description
The guide is not legal advice
